description: Deterministic classification rules for /insight-enhance. Rules evaluated in order; first matching outcome wins. Edit this file to retune the skill's judgement without touching code.

length_bounds.rationale: Below 150 chars: too terse to have meaningful claim surface. Above 2000 chars: already dense; enrichment adds noise.

skip_if.name: already_enriched
skip_if.reason: Enriched rows must not be re-enriched (prevents v2→v3 drift).

skip_if.name: already_has_citations
skip_if.reason: Row already carries [N] citation markers; assumed complete unless --force.

skip_if.name: self_observation
skip_if.test: regex_ci:(we noticed|in this session|i found|today we|just now|earlier today)
skip_if.reason: Transient session observation; not transferable knowledge — belongs in session-context, not enriched insights.

skip_if.name: superseded
skip_if.reason: Row already replaced by a later enrichment.

skip_if.name: locked
skip_if.reason: Another /insight-enhance run is processing this row.

enrichable_signals.name: has_factual_claim_no_citation
enrichable_signals.rationale: Generalised claim without specific source — strong candidate.

enrichable_signals.name: has_tool_or_library_name
enrichable_signals.rationale: Named tool/library → likely has authoritative docs via Context7.

enrichable_signals.name: has_version_number
enrichable_signals.rationale: Version number indicates specific factual claim that can be verified.

enrichable_signals.name: pentest_tag_no_cve
enrichable_signals.rationale: [PENTEST] insight without MITRE/CVE anchor — often enrichable via known-exploit databases.

enrichable_signals.name: vague_quantifier
enrichable_signals.rationale: Vague quantifier — candidate for quantified replacement.

routing.description: Which composition skill to dispatch per insight shape.

rules.name: factoid_single_claim
rules.rationale: Single-claim short insights → /question quick-mode (1 convergent query).

rules.name: architecture_multi_claim
rules.rationale: Multi-claim or pattern-level insights → full research pipeline.

hard_gates.rationale: These gates are load-bearing. Lowering them defeats the audit-driven failure-mode mitigations.
